message:
fix: shell-quote interpolated args in dolt remote fallback messages (bd-6dvy)

The CLI remote fallback warning messages in doltRemoteAddCmd and
doltRemoteRemoveCmd interpolated name/url/dbPath directly into
suggested shell commands. If values contained shell metacharacters
and a user copied the suggested command, this could be exploited.

Add ShellQuote helper (single-quote wrapping with embedded quote
escaping) and apply it to all interpolated values in the two
warning messages.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
